item.title: See the Cast of “Love Story: John F. Kennedy Jr. & Carolyn Bessette” Side-by-Side with the Real People They Play
item.description: John F. Kennedy Jr. and Carolyn Bessette’s romance is the subject of a new FX limited series

item.title: Jennie Is on a Chic Streak at New York Fashion Week, Plus Jane Fonda, Kerry Washington, Dakota Johnson and More
item.description: From New York City to Los Angeles, and everywhere in between, see what your favorite stars are up to

item.title: Anthony Hopkins Played Hannibal Lecter with 'Great Relish,' Said It Was 'Easy' to Step into Role as Terrifying Killer
item.description: “Maybe it's in the genes,” Hopkins told PEOPLE in a March 1991 interview

item.title: Keke Palmer Shares Her Son's Most Recent Milestone, and What Motherhood Has Taught Her (Exclusive)
item.description: Palmer is mom to Leodis "Leo" Andrellton, 2, whom she shares with her ex-boyfriend, Darius Jackson

item.title: Bad Bunny Sparks Rumors He’s Back with Ex Gabriela Berlingeri After Pair Step Out for Dinner Together
item.description: The Grammy winner and jewelry designer quietly went their separate ways in late 2022
